results.name: 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD, 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDSLC.cbl
Program: COCRDSLC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD, 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD-EXIT (lines 736-778)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDSL, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD, 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD-EXIT in COCRDSLC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD.                                                 
      *    Read the Card file                                                   
      *                                                                         
      *    MOVE CC-ACCT-ID-N      TO WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID                        
           MOVE CC-CARD-NUM       TO WS-CARD-RID-CARDNUM                        
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS READ                                                       
                FILE      (LIT-CARDFILENAME)                                    
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-CARDNUM)                                 
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-CARDNUM)                       
                INTO      (CARD-RECORD)                                         
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-RECORD)                               
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)                                          
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD                                                  
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)                                             
                  SET FOUND-CARDS-FOR-ACCOUNT TO TRUE                           
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)                                             
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                    TO TRUE                    
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK          TO TRUE                    
                  SET FLG-CARDFILTER-NOT-OK          TO TRUE                    
                  IF  WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                                         
                      SET DID-NOT-FIND-ACCTCARD-COMBO TO TRUE                   
                  END-IF                                                        
               WHEN OTHER                                                       
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                    TO TRUE                    
                  IF  WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                                         
                      SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK      TO TRUE                    
                  END-IF                                                        
                  MOVE 'READ'                        TO ERROR-OPNAME            
                  MOVE LIT-CARDFILENAME                TO ERROR-FILE            
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                    TO ERROR-RESP              
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                    TO ERROR-RESP2             
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE         TO WS-RETURN-MSG           
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD-EXIT.                                            
           EXIT                                                                 
           .

results.name: 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD
results.preamble:
File: COCRDUPC.cbl
Program: COCRDUPC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD (lines 1376-1414)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDUP, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD in COCRDUPC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
9100-GETCARD-BYACCTCARD.                                                 
      *    Read the Card file                                                   
      *                                                                         
      *    MOVE CC-ACCT-ID-N            TO WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID                  
           MOVE CC-CARD-NUM             TO WS-CARD-RID-CARDNUM                  
                                                                                
           EXEC CICS READ                                                       
                FILE      (LIT-CARDFILENAME)                                    
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-CARDNUM)                                 
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-CARDNUM)                       
                INTO      (CARD-RECORD)                                         
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-RECORD)                               
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)                                          
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD                                                  
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)                                             
                  SET FOUND-CARDS-FOR-ACCOUNT TO TRUE                           
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)                                             
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                    TO TRUE                    
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK          TO TRUE                    
                  SET FLG-CARDFILTER-NOT-OK          TO TRUE                    
                  IF  WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                                         
                     SET DID-NOT-FIND-ACCTCARD-COMBO TO TRUE                    
                  END-IF                                                        
               WHEN OTHER                                                       
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                    TO TRUE                    
                  IF  WS-RETURN-MSG-OFF                                         
                      SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK      TO TRUE                    
                  END-IF                                                        
                  MOVE 'READ'                        TO ERROR-OPNAME            
                  MOVE LIT-CARDFILENAME              TO ERROR-FILE              
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                    TO ERROR-RESP              
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                    TO ERROR-RESP2             
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE         TO WS-RETURN-MSG           
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
           .

       LINKAGE SECTION.

results.name: 9150-GETCARD-BYACCT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDSLC.cbl
Program: COCRDSLC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 9150-GETCARD-BYACCT (lines 779-809)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDSL, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 9150-GETCARD-BYACCT in COCRDSLC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
9150-GETCARD-BYACCT.                                                     
                                                                                
      *    Read the Card file. Access via alternate index ACCTID                
      *                                                                         
           EXEC CICS READ                                                       
                FILE      (LIT-CARDFILENAME-ACCT-PATH)                          
                RIDFLD    (WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID)                                 
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-CARD-RID-ACCT-ID)                       
                INTO      (CARD-RECORD)                                         
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF CARD-RECORD)                               
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)                                          
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)                                          
           END-EXEC                                                             
                                                                                
           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD                                                  
               WHEN DFHRESP(NORMAL)                                             
                  SET FOUND-CARDS-FOR-ACCOUNT TO TRUE                           
               WHEN DFHRESP(NOTFND)                                             
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE                       
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                TO TRUE              
                  SET DID-NOT-FIND-ACCT-IN-CARDXREF TO TRUE                     
               WHEN OTHER                                                       
                  SET INPUT-ERROR                 TO TRUE                       
                  SET FLG-ACCTFILTER-NOT-OK                TO TRUE              
                  MOVE 'READ'                     TO ERROR-OPNAME               
                  MOVE LIT-CARDFILENAME-ACCT-PATH TO ERROR-FILE                 
                  MOVE WS-RESP-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP                 
                  MOVE WS-REAS-CD                 TO ERROR-RESP2                
                  MOVE WS-FILE-ERROR-MESSAGE      TO WS-RETURN-MSG              
           END-EVALUATE                                                         
           .

results.name: 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT
results.preamble:
File: COCRDSLC.cbl
Program: COCRDSLC - Business logic - Accept and process credit card detail request
Paragraph: 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT (lines 457-501)
References: COPY CVCRD01Y, COPY COCOM01Y, COPY DFHBMSCA, COPY DFHAID, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY COCRDSL, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSMSG02Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY CVACT02Y, COPY CVCUS01Y
results.summary: paragraph 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS, 1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT in COCRDSLC.cbl. uses COPY refs: CVCRD01Y, COCOM01Y, DFHBMSCA, DFHAID....
results.content:
1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS.                                                  
      *    INITIALIZE SEARCH CRITERIA                                           
           IF EIBCALEN = 0                                                      
              SET  WS-PROMPT-FOR-INPUT TO TRUE                                  
           ELSE                                                                 
              IF CDEMO-ACCT-ID = 0                                              
                 MOVE LOW-VALUES   TO ACCTSIDO OF CCRDSLAO                      
              ELSE                                                              
                 MOVE CC-ACCT-ID   TO ACCTSIDO OF CCRDSLAO                      
              END-IF                                                            
                                                                                
              IF CDEMO-CARD-NUM = 0                                             
                MOVE LOW-VALUES   TO CARDSIDO OF CCRDSLAO                       
              ELSE                                                              
                MOVE CC-CARD-NUM  TO CARDSIDO OF CCRDSLAO                       
              END-IF                                                            
                                                                                
              IF FOUND-CARDS-FOR-ACCOUNT                                        
                 MOVE CARD-EMBOSSED-NAME                                        
                                        TO CRDNAMEO OF CCRDSLAO                 
                 MOVE CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE                                       
                                        TO CARD-EXPIRAION-DATE-X                
                                                                                
                 MOVE CARD-EXPIRY-MONTH TO EXPMONO  OF CCRDSLAO                 
                                                                                
                 MOVE CARD-EXPIRY-YEAR  TO EXPYEARO OF CCRDSLAO                 
                                                                                
                 MOVE CARD-ACTIVE-STATUS TO CRDSTCDO OF CCRDSLAO                
              END-IF                                                            
            END-IF                                                              
                                                                                
                                                                                
      *    SETUP MESSAGE                                                        
           IF WS-NO-INFO-MESSAGE                                                
             SET WS-PROMPT-FOR-INPUT TO TRUE                                    
           END-IF                                                               
                                                                                
           MOVE WS-RETURN-MSG          TO ERRMSGO OF CCRDSLAO                   
                                                                                
           MOVE WS-INFO-MSG            TO INFOMSGO OF CCRDSLAO                  
           .                                                                    
                                                                                
       1200-SETUP-SCREEN-VARS-EXIT.                                             
           EXIT                                                                 
           .
